feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Hi, my name is Carmen Winstead. I'm 17 years old. I am very similar to you. Did …
entry.content: Hi, my name is Carmen Winstead. I'm 17 years old. I am very similar to you. Did I mention to you that I'm dead? A few years ago, a group of girls pushed me down a sewer hole to try and embarrass me. When I didn't come back up, the police came. The girls said that I had fell and everyone believed them. The police found my body in the sewer. I had a broken neck and my face was torn off. Send this message to 15 people after you listened the whole message if you value your life. A boy called David r

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Nioh 2 is the best action combat game ever made, for a few key reasons >games li…
entry.content: Nioh 2 is the best action combat game ever made, for a few key reasons >games like dmc and Bayonetta have a fluid fleshed out combat system with lots of combo routes but the enemies are just juggling bags. The enemies in nioh 2 have fully fleshed out challenging movesets that get harder for each ng you go up. You have the stylish combo systems from other great action titles with the added bonus of trash mobs being challenging and fun to fight. >the weapon variety and talents add practically infi

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Graphics peaked in 2018 and now, somehow, they seem to be getting worse. Do stud…

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: How? I just finished it. How is this game so highly rated? I regret paying full …
entry.content: How? I just finished it. How is this game so highly rated? I regret paying full price for this. I really do, at least I got a physical copy I can resell but man, what a disappointing game. You expected at least some of the Hitman formula, but instead what you get is a very lame action game with incredibly boilerplate uninteresting gameplay, very little variety to any of it. The few times where the game seems like it might do something interesting it just falls flat and fails, like the Resort lev

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /spt/ - Straight Pokephilia Thread
entry.content: American beer Pokephilia /pō-kē-ˈfilēə / n. sexual attraction of a human toward a pokemon, which may involve the experience of sexual fantasies about the pokemon or the pursuit of real sexual contact with it. Note that pokémon on pokémon is not pokephilia. Post female pokémon with male humans and solo female pokémon. F human/M pokémon are allowed too, but not solo male pokémon. Ignore on-model autists, anthro is okay. AI is tolerated, but leave dumps to dedicated threads. Previous thread: https:

entry.title: /int/ International: Aussiebros, why the hate?
entry.content: Before this game I’ve been aware of this weird idea where Aussies either think we hate each other, or just outright hate us, why? My entire childhood up until adulthood I was led to believe us and Aussies loved each other, but a few years ago upon meeting some learned you guys fucking despise us, more than Canadians seemingly, wtf why? You guys are Crocodile Dundee and Kangaroos, we like that. This game showed a lot of other Americans y’all’s hate as well, and we’re all confused, like the Englis

Update: thanks for the kind comments, fellow youtubers; wow I didn’t expect so many upvotes! >black man here. I listened to this back in the 90s when all my friends were listening to hardcore rap and hip hop. it was my guilty pleasure. Now I don’t care who knows I listen to this band! >Japanese man here; I remembe

entry.title: /int/ International: Thirdie bros. Recently because of classes or going out to play football I've bee…
entry.content: Thirdie bros. Recently because of classes or going out to play football I've been in contact with a lot of teenagers. The stories about the kind of stuff that some women do and how a few have unironically reverse harems is really brutal. Also I barely know people of my age who have kids, our fertility rate in the cities should be around 0.7, but rural areas are bumping that number to 1.9. I swear everything is soul crushing these days. t.26

entry.content: Momo edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. All games, anime and gacha waifus welcome.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I hate all women with a passion. My misogyny runs so deep that merely seeing som…
entry.content: I hate all women with a passion. My misogyny runs so deep that merely seeing someone mention something positive about women or admiration for a female makes me mad. Or just hearing anything not negative or at least neutral about women fills me with a rage that I find impossible to describe. It's akin to helplessness or maybe desperation. But I think it might be a projection of the sinking feeling that every ship I could have boarded has already sailed.
